rationale: Stellar eliminated its protocol-level inflation mechanism in October 2019 via a network vote (SCP vote on inflation removal), and the Stellar Development Foundation subsequently burned 55 billion XLM from its own holdings in November 2019, reducing total supply to ~50 billion XLM with no further programmatic issuance. The fixed maximum supply is 50,001,806,812 XLM; no new XLM is minted by the protocol, so the annualized inflation rate is effectively 0%.
